title: HTTP APIs and Channels
description: Build a channel component that exposes HTTP endpoints and feeds input into the reactive system.
channels_desc: A channel is a component that starts an HTTP server on mount and stops it on cleanup. Incoming requests call callback props, which update signals and trigger downstream components.
http_server_intro: The <0>Channel</0> component starts a Hono server inside <1>onMount</1>. Route handlers are passed in as props. <2>onCleanup</2> shuts down the server when the component is removed.
reactive_flow_intro: The channel's callback props call <0>setSites</0>, <1>setPendingGeneration</1>, and other setters. Those signal updates trigger effects and <2>Show</2>/<3>For</3> components downstream.
info_cleanup: The <0>onCleanup</0> callback releases the port when the component is removed or the app stops.
